prompt.name: Coherence Coach Track — S12 验证与穷举重测
prompt.sub_stage_name: 验证 — 单元测试 + 穷举重测 + 回归
prompt.role: 你是 Coherence Phase 12 验证者。 你的任务是：为 S12.1-S12.4 编写测试，并运行穷举重测验证改进效果。

test.name: test_fallback_templates_exist
test.description: 确认 fallback_templates 配置已加载，至少覆盖 20 个意图
test.code: def test_fallback_templates_exist(): from src.coach.fallback import FallbackEngine import yaml from pathlib import Path cfg = yaml.safe_load(open(Path(__file__).parent.parent / "config" / "coach_defaults.yaml")) ft = cfg.get("fallback_templates", {}) total = sum(len(v) for v in ft.values()) assert total >= 20, f"fallback_templates only covers {total} intents"

test.name: test_fallback_generates_content
test.description: 确认 FallbackEngine.generate() 返回有实际内容的回复
test.code: def test_fallback_generates_content(): engine = FallbackEngine(test_config) payload = engine.generate("scaffold", "变量是什么") assert len(payload.get("statement", "")) > 30 # 至少 30 字 assert len(payload.get("steps", [])) >= 2 # 至少 2 步 assert len(payload.get("question", "")) > 5 # 有追问

test.name: test_fallback_template_has_analogy
test.description: 确认模板包含比喻（像/就像/好比）
test.code: def test_fallback_template_has_analogy(): engine = FallbackEngine(test_config) payload = engine.generate("scaffold", "变量是什么") stmt = payload.get("statement", "") has_analogy = any(w in stmt for w in ["像", "就像", "好比", "相当于", "可以理解为"]) assert has_analogy, f"Statement lacks analogy: {stmt[:80]}"

test.name: test_fallback_encouragement
test.description: 确认 fallback 回复包含鼓励性语言
test.code: def test_fallback_encouragement(): engine = FallbackEngine(test_config) payload = engine.generate("scaffold", "变量是什么", {"turn": 3}) stmt = payload.get("statement", "") has_enc = any(w in stmt for w in ["好", "棒", "不错", "很好", "加油", "对"]) assert has_enc, f"Statement lacks encouragement: {stmt[:80]}"

test.name: test_fallback_context_reference
test.description: 确认上下文引用（用户确认时回复以"你说得对"开头）

test.name: test_fallback_probe_relevant
test.description: 确认 probe 生成的内容与 skill 相关
test.code: def test_fallback_probe_relevant(): engine = FallbackEngine(test_config) payload = engine.generate("probe", "python_variable") question = payload.get("question", "") assert any(w in question for w in ["变量", "age", "赋值", "int", "str"])

test.name: test_fallback_no_empty_responses
test.description: 确认所有 action_type 都不会返回空回复

step.name: 3. 穷举重测 (LLM OFF)
step.note: 仅测试 LLM OFF 的 128 组合（规则引擎本身）
step.command:
python -c " import sys, json, subprocess, os, itertools sys.path.insert(0, '.') from tests.test_exhaustive_all_configs import generate_all_combos, run_combo_subprocess, build_dialogue_pool
pool = build_dialogue_pool() topics = list(pool.keys()) combos = [(l,c) for l,c in generate_all_combos() if not c.get('llm.enabled')]
total = [] for i, (label, combo) in enumerate(combos[:20]): # 样本 20 组合 topic = topics[i % len(topics)] r = run_combo_subprocess(label, combo, pool[topic], topic) if r.get('ok'): for t in r['results']: total.append(t['total_score']) if total: print(f'Sample LLM OFF avg: {sum(total)/len(total):.1f}/24 (n={len(total)})') "

step.name: 4. 穷举全量
step.expected: LLM OFF avg: 12+/24, LLM ON avg: 17+/24, 256/256 pass
